description: Seventh corpus member attaches to the Galarian regional-forms cohort. Ghost-type bleached-coral variant of the Hoennian Water/Rock original. The cohort's first environmental-decay-axis representative — the Galarica-seed, climate-exposure, martial-tradition, and performance-culture axes were already on the board; ocean-recession-as-coral-bleaching is a fifth canonical mechanism orthogonal to all four. Behold. The cohort's adaptation-lore grid is more materially-specified than the Alolan precedent claimed, and Corsola makes the climate-change reading explicit. Blueballed-by-fanout is the price of useful structure.
citations: [Bulbapedia: Corsola (Pokemon) — Galarian Form section; Ghost-type variant, evolves to Cursola]
[Bulbapedia: Cursola (Pokemon) — SwSh-introduced evolved petrified-coral endpoint, no original-region counterpart]
[PokemonTCG.io API: swsh2-78 — flavor_text canonizing ocean-recession habitat-loss framing]
[Pokemon Sword & Shield (Game Freak, 2019) — primary canon for the Galarian variant species and the regional-adaptation framing]
other_candidates_considered: Within-set RBC adjacency check: Galarian Corsola (RBC-078) is NOT collector-adjacent to any other Galarian-variant in RBC (Galarian Darumaka at 047, Galarian Mr. Mime at 037, Galarian Farfetch'd at 094, Galarian Meowth at 126 — none adjacent). No within-set evolution-mirror pair available; the cohort-node fan is the right shape.

Galarian Cursola line-completion pair speculation — rejected; Cursola is not in corpus. When Cursola lands in any future Collectr CSV upload, the species-pair edge becomes warrantable as a within-line evolution mirror parallel to the wave-22 DAA Mr. Mime / Mr. Rime pair.
